title: pinus sylvestris subvar. gibba
intro: Pinus sylvestris subvar. gibba, also known as the dwarf Scots pine, is a small, shrub-like coniferous tree native to Northern Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Pinus sylvestris subvar. gibba include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and potentially lowering blood pressure. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its essential oil can be extracted for use in herbal remedies.
